# unifi_traffic_matching_list (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi traffic matching list by `id` or `name` within a site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing traffic matching list by name.
data "unifi_site" "main" {
  name = "Default"
}

data "unifi_traffic_matching_list" "web_ports" {
  site_id = data.unifi_site.main.id
  name    = "web-ports"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_id` (String)

### Optional

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ipv4_addresses` (Set of String)
- `ipv6_addresses` (Set of String)
- `ports` (Set of String)
- `type` (String)
